headline: Spirit Airlines is no more ... and now the blame game begins
summary: After years of financial turbulence, Spirit Airlines officially ceased all operations at 3 a.m. ET Saturday night, marking the end of one of America's most recognizable budget carriers. The airline's collapse came after a blocked merger attempt, a bankruptcy filing, and a failed government bailout.

raw.headline: Spirit Airlines is no more ... and now the blame game begins
